home.hero_title:
Born from the shadows,
dressed in light.
home.hero_subtitle: Luxury sustainable womenswear, made with intention in Algeria.
home.story_title:
I didn't start a brand.
I found a way to survive.
home.story_p1: ru.Cloud was born in 2023, not from a business plan, but from pain, resilience, and an unshakeable belief that beauty can be built from the darkest places. Every stitch carries a memory. Every silhouette, a chapter of a story that refused to end quietly.
home.story_p2: This brand is my voice, and now, it can be yours too.
home.newsletter_subtitle: Be the first to know about new collections, exclusive drops, and stories from the atelier.

footer.tagline: Born from the shadows, dressed in light. Luxury sustainable womenswear, made with intention in Algeria.

story.title:
Born from the shadows,
dressed in light.
story.brand_p1: rucloud was created from the idea that clothing should feel more than beautiful, it should feel meaningful.
story.brand_p2: Built around calm silhouettes, soft strength, and timeless elegance, rucloud designs are made for women who carry presence and power quietly.
story.brand_p3: Inspired by emotion, resilience, and the beauty of simplicity, each piece is created to blend comfort, femininity, and confidence into everyday life.
story.brand_closing:
rucloud is not driven by trends.
It is driven by identity.
story.founder_p1: rucloud was founded by Rokia, a young creative balancing fashion, technology, and entrepreneurship.
story.founder_p2: What began as a personal creative escape slowly became a vision: building a brand that combines emotion, minimalism, and strong feminine energy.
story.founder_p3: From managing ateliers to designing collections while studying and working in tech, rucloud reflects a journey built with persistence, curiosity, and passion for meaningful creation.
story.founder_p4: Every collection is approached with intention, focusing on timeless pieces, refined details, and emotional connection.
story.founder_p5: Algerian Designer Rokia harnesses her self-taught skills, obtained in her great aunt's sewing atelier in Algeria, to create contemporary modest fashion designs. With her signature style and impactful digital presence, Rokia BOUFRAH built an empire over the years. Wanting to share her true passion with the women of the world, Rokia founded her namesake brand rucloud in 2023.
story.founder_p6: Rokia has turned her greatest passion into a global leading modest fashion brand, with a community of women that are as fashionable as they are inspiring and resilient.
story.founder_p7: For Rokia, fashion has always played an important part in her life and identity and expresses her creativity through her personal style. After making the personal decision to cover her hair, she struggled to find clothing that aligned as much with her personal style as it did with her core beliefs and values. This inspired her to create clothing that she could personally identify with, hoping that women with similar experiences would feel seen and heard.
story.founder_p8: With this innovative and contemporary approach, Rokia has become one of the pioneers of modest fashion and hopes to be a deciding voice in the fashion industry, and with unity and inclusivity in mind, to change it for the better.
